name: Brightlocal
description:
What Brightlocal Does

BrightLocal offers a comprehensive citation builder tool designed for managing business listings at scale. The platform stands out with its highly visual dashboards and robust reporting functionalities, providing users with clear insights into their local SEO performance.

‍

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Citation Builder: A managed service for the Authority Layer (Manta, Merchant Circle, Tupalo, Hotfrog, Superpages)
  • Expert team for building and fixing listings across authoritative, citation-boosting sites
  • Permanent ownership of local citations with no recurring fees
  • Active Sync for the Engagement Layer (Google, Apple Maps, Facebook, Bing) using APIs
  • Streamlined setup process for maintaining critical listing accuracy

Benefits of Brightlocal

  • Establish strong authority with consistent local citations across top web platforms
  • Save time and ensure quality with expert management of the authority layer
  • Gain lasting credibility and ROI through permanent citation ownership
  • Keep vital listings fresh and visible to customers with Active Sync
  • Maintain a robust, defensible local presence immune to outdated data disruptions

Pricing

Starting at $3 per listing site per location (additional costs for listing updates)

Pros

✅ Excellent visualization and reporting capabilities

✅ Additional support for building authority on listing sites

Cons

❌ Partially manual citation tool, potentially leading to slower updates

❌ Updates and changes may be more time-consuming and costly compared to other tools

‍
